completed_tasks.subject: shouldBuff distance-based fix (was: v14 Opening Burst)
completed_tasks.root_cause: shouldBuff() returned false on turn 1 due to unknown TTK, preventing MOTIVATION+BOOTS buffs. Online enemies start 12-15 cells apart (out of range), so buffing is always correct at distance.
completed_tasks.solution: Distance check: buff if dist > 10, attack if close. 15-line change replaced entire v14 module (173 lines). Sim-neutral (51-49), expected positive online.
learnings: Sim starts enemies ~8-10 cells; online ~12-15. Buff strategies must adapt to both.
Always buff turn 1 was catastrophic (18% WR) — distance guard is the correct pattern.
Mirror match 50/50 is the sanity check before deploying any AI change.

completed_tasks.subject: AI version tracking — leek ai status + SOTA symlink
completed_tasks.solution: ais/current symlink → deployed file. leek ai status shows server + local + sync. deploy auto-updates symlink.

completed_tasks.subject: Solo tournament automation
completed_tasks.solution: Tournament CLI fixed (defaults to leek, handles already_registered). Added ensure-registration step to GH Actions. Registration is persistent toggle.
learnings: LeekWars returns 401 for business errors (already_registered, too_much_weapons). Parse JSON body before raising.
Tournament registration is a persistent toggle — register once, stay registered.

completed_tasks.subject: Refactor simulation scripts: shared build profile
completed_tasks.solution: Created scripts/sim_defaults.py as SSOT. Rewrote compare_ais.py and debug_fight.py. Deleted 6 redundant scripts.
learnings: Always validate sim scripts use correct defaults — wrong HP/weapons caused misleading results for weeks.

completed_tasks.subject: Fight Economy Optimization
completed_tasks.solution: All actionable items completed across #88 (BR WS), #89 (scraper backfill). Economy verified healthy.
learnings: Pack ROI needs Talent > 100 (we're at 89 now, getting close)
